title_clean: This instant is the only time there is.
idea_clean: This instant is the only time there is. I have conceived of time in such a way that I defeat my aim. If I elect to reach past time to timelessness, I must change my perception of what time is for. Time's purpose cannot be to keep the past and future one. The only interval in which I can be saved from time is now. For in this instant has forgiveness come to set me free. The birth of Christ is now, without a past or future. He has come to give His present blessing to the world, restoring it to timelessness and love. And love is ever-present, here and now. Thanks for this instant, Father. It is now I am redeemed. This instant is the time You have appointed for Your Son's release, and for salvation of the world in him.

practice_instructions.frequency: Twice a day (morning/evening), plus hourly remembrance and response to temptation
practice_instructions.duration: As long as it makes you happy
practice_instructions.description: Morning/night: Spend quiet time meditating on the lesson and prayer. Hourly: Take a brief moment to remember God. Response to temptation: Use the idea to quiet any upset.

prayer: Thanks for this instant, Father. It is now I am redeemed. This instant is the time You have appointed for Your Son's release, and for salvation of the world in him.
